content.title: Error: listen EADDRINUSE: address already in use :::8001
content.body:
View details in Rollbar: [https://app.rollbar.com/a/thomas.iniguez/fix/item/FirstProject/33](https://app.rollbar.com/a/thomas.iniguez/fix/item/FirstProject/33)

```

Error: listen EADDRINUSE: address already in use :::8001
  File "node:net", line 1908, in Server.setupListenHandle [as _listen2]
  File "node:net", line 1965, in listenInCluster
  File "node:net", line 2067, in Server.listen
  File "C:\Users\alpha\AppData\Local\Temp\3AM6P7NubvwTm7PrX4xXyHZkbdy\resources\app.asar\node_modules\express\lib\application.js", line 635, in Function.listen
  File "C:\Users\alpha\AppData\Local\Temp\3AM6P7NubvwTm7PrX4xXyHZkbdy\resources\app.asar\src\index.js", line 588, in <unknown>
```
content.author: alphaleadership

acceptanceCriteria: The application starts successfully without encountering an 'EADDRINUSE' error when attempting to listen on port 8001 (or a configured alternative).
The application provides a mechanism (e.g., configurable port, graceful error message, or automatic port retry) to handle scenarios where the default port is already in use.
If applicable to this project, documentation includes guidance for users on how to troubleshoot and resolve 'EADDRINUSE' errors.

details: Clarification on whether 'FirstProject' (the application referenced in the stack trace and Rollbar link) is part of this `github-gemini-integration` repository, or if this issue is misfiled from a different project.
Exact steps to reproduce the error.
Details about the execution environment (e.g., if multiple instances of the application are intended to run, or if other services are expected on port 8001).
Whether the port 8001 is configurable within the application.
